_note: Pathway advisor thresholds and CTA configuration. These values drive the pathway-advisor logic module. Update cut-off references whenever IRCC holds a new round of invitations.

generalDraw._todoVerify: TODO:VERIFY — update general draw cut-off with most recent IRCC round

cecDraw._todoVerify: TODO:VERIFY — update CEC draw cut-off with most recent IRCC round

frenchDraw._todoVerify: TODO:VERIFY — update French draw cut-off with most recent IRCC round

competitiveForGeneralDraw._note: CRS >= generalDraw.recentScore → candidate is competitive for general draws

nearCompetitiveForGeneralDraw._note: CRS within 100 points of general cutoff → 'Getting close' message with score improvement levers

pnpRecommendationThreshold._note: If CRS < 400 and no category match, PNP should be the primary recommendation

frenchPathwayThreshold._note: If candidate has NCLC 5+ in any French ability, surface French pathway as an option. NCLC 7+ in all 4 abilities triggers the actual bonus.

scoreImprovementLevers.titleFa: کسب تجربه کاری بیشتر در کانادا

scoreImprovementLevers.titleEn: Complete a higher level of education
Add or improve second official language score
scoreImprovementLevers.titleFa: افزودن یا بهبود نمره زبان رسمی دوم

ctaConfig.note: Update this link if the booking page URL changes

disclaimerEn: This tool provides general information only. It is not legal advice and is not a substitute for a Regulated Canadian Immigration Consultant (RCIC) or immigration lawyer. CRS scores are estimates and may differ from official IRCC calculations. The only authoritative source for Express Entry is IRCC / canada.ca. Cut-off scores change with every draw — verify current cut-offs on the official IRCC rounds of invitations page before making any decisions.
disclaimerFa: این ابزار اطلاعات عمومی ارائه می‌دهد و مشاوره حقوقی نیست. جایگزین مشاور مهاجرتی مجاز کانادا (RCIC) یا وکیل مهاجرت نمی‌شود. امتیاز CRS تخمینی است و ممکن است با محاسبات رسمی IRCC متفاوت باشد. تنها منبع معتبر برای Express Entry، وب‌سایت IRCC / canada.ca است. حد نصاب‌های هر دوره انتخاب تغییر می‌کنند — قبل از هرگونه تصمیم‌گیری، آخرین آمار را از صفحه رسمی IRCC بررسی کنید.
